chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA 1st Criminal Bail No.S-734 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on bail application. ------ 01.09.2025 Mr. Mushtaq Ali Langah, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Sardar Ali, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------ Counsel for the applicant under the instructions does not wish to press this Criminal Bail Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge Manzoor
